description: Legal record of an adoption in which a man 'sells' his newborn daughter, 16 days old, whose mother had just died after childbirth, to a prominent lady for five dinars and promises that he will not interfere with the girl's upbringing. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, pp. 248, 249) Verso, right column.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
